entry.title: New: Resolution 1780-27 (Hawaiʻi County) — On agenda 2025-08-06
entry.content:
TO PROVIDE FOR A LOAN FROM THE UNITED STATES OF AMERICA, DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE, TO FINANCE CERTAIN PUBLIC WATER SYSTEM IMPROVEMENTS FOR IKI PLACE, KOHANAIKI HOMESTEADS, NORTH KONA, HAWAI‘I; AUTHORIZES THE EXECUTION OF AN AGREEMENT WITH THE UNITED STATES OF AMERICA, DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE, FOR A GRANT FOR COSTS OF SUCH PUBLIC WATER SYSTEM IMPROVEMENTS; AND AUTHORIZES THE MAYOR, THE MANAGER-C

Authorizes a loan agreement with the USDA not to exceed $275,000 and a grant agreement not to exceed $825,000 to fund a portion of the costs of constructing a public water system for Iki Place, Kohanaiki Homesteads.

Latest action: On agenda 2025-08-06

View on the council site
